_notes: Hand-curated by reading the US Core MedicationRequest differential (21 elements) line by line against the R4 MedicationRequest snapshot. Key R4 facts: status min=1 required:medicationrequest-status|4.0.1; intent min=1 required:medicationrequest-intent|4.0.1; category min=0 example:medicationrequest-category; reported[x] min=0 Reference(boolean|Patient|Practitioner|PractitionerRole|RelatedPerson|Organization); medication[x] min=1 example:medication-codes Reference(CodeableConcept|Medication); subject min=1 Reference(Patient|Group); encounter min=0 Reference(Encounter); authoredOn min=0; requester min=0; reasonCode min=0 example:condition-code; reasonReference min=0; dosageInstruction min=0; dispenseRequest min=0.

drifts.description: Constraint 'us-core-21' added (severity: error): requester SHALL be present if intent is 'order', 'original-order', 'reflex-order', 'filler-order', or 'instance-order'. Not present in R4 base MedicationRequest.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'medicationrequest-status|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'medicationrequest-status' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'medicationrequest-intent|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'medicationrequest-intent' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Slicing added on category: discriminator type=pattern, path=$this, rules=open. No slicing exists in R4 base.
New slice 'us-core' added (min=0, max=*, mustSupport=true). Slice is open (not mandatory). No equivalent in R4 base.

Binding added on slice 'us-core': required strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/medicationrequest-category. R4 base has example binding on parent category; this slice introduces required strength binding.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Reference target profiles constrained: R4 allows Reference(Patient|Practitioner|PractitionerRole|RelatedPerson|Organization). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-practitioner|us-core-organization|us-core-patient|us-core-practitionerrole|us-core-relatedperson).
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(CodeableConcept|Medication). US Core restricts the Reference type to Reference(us-core-medication), narrowing from generic Medication.

Binding changed: R4 uses example strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/medication-codes. US Core adds extensible binding to http://cts.nlm.nih.gov/fhir/ValueSet/2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1010.4 (US medication clinical drug codes). Binding strength tightened: example -> extensible.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Patient|Group). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-patient) only.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Encounter). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-encounter).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). Conditionally required by us-core-21 when intent is an order type.

Reference target profiles constrained: R4 allows Reference(Practitioner|PractitionerRole|Organization|Patient|RelatedPerson|Device). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-practitioner|us-core-patient|us-core-organization|us-core-practitionerrole|us-core-relatedperson|Device). Device is preserved; human-facing references replaced with US Core profiles.

Binding changed: R4 uses example strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code. US Core tightens to extensible strength with http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-condition-code (US-specific condition codes). Binding strength tightened: example -> extensible. No mustSupport added.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 MedicationRequest snapshot does not explicitly constrain Dosage sub-elements; this is the first explicit constraint on dosageInstruction.text.

MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 MedicationRequest snapshot does not explicitly constrain Dosage sub-elements; this is the first explicit constraint on dosageInstruction.timing.

MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 MedicationRequest snapshot does not explicitly constrain Dosage sub-elements; this is the first explicit constraint on dosageInstruction.doseAndRate.
MustSupport added in target. New binding added: preferred strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/ucum-common (UCUM common units). R4 has no explicit constraint on this element.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.status in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.intent in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.category in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.category:us-core in target profile. Marks this slice as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement. No equivalent element in R4 base.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.reported[x] in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.requester in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.reasonCode in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.reasonReference in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.dosageInstruction in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.dosageInstruction.text in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.dosageInstruction.timing in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.dosageInstruction.doseAndRate in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.dosageInstruction.doseAndRate.dose[x] in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest.numberOfRepeatsAllowed in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest.quantity in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
